title: rosa canina var. tenuissima
intro: Rosa canina var. tenuissima, also known as the Scotch rose or wild rose, is a variety of the rose plant native to the Scottish Highlands. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. tenuissima include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and other antioxidants, which make it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Rosa canina var. tenuissima can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
